content.problemStatement:
You are given a positive integer NNN.

Consider an array AAA of length NNN. Let PiP_iPi‚Äč denote the sum of the first iii elements of AAA and SiS_iSi‚Äč denote the sum of the last iii elements of AAA.

You need to construct the array AAA of size NNN such that all of the following conditions are met:


‚ąí109‚Č§Ai‚Č§109-10^9 \leq A_i \leq 10^9‚ąí109‚Č§Ai‚Äč‚Č§109, for all (1‚Č§i‚Č§N)(1\le i \le N)(1‚Č§i‚Č§N)
Pi>SiP_i \gt S_iPi‚Äč>Si‚Äč if iii is odd, for each (1‚Č§i<N)(1 \leq i \lt N)(1‚Č§i<N)
Pi<SiP_i \lt S_iPi‚Äč<Si‚Äč if iii is even, for each (1‚Č§i<N)(1 \leq i \lt N)(1‚Č§i<N)
If there are multiple solutions, you can print any of them.

If there is no such array, print ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1 instead.


Input Format

Each test contains multiple test cases. The first line contains the number of test cases TTT.
The only line of each test case contains a single integer NNN, where NNN is the length of the required array.


Output Format
For each test case, if a **valid** array exists, print NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč satisfying all the given conditions.


If there are multiple solutions, you can print any of them.

If there is no such array, print ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1 instead.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 3‚čÖ1053 \cdot 10^53‚čÖ105.

For i=1i = 1i=1: Since iii is odd, P1=343P_1 = 343P1‚Äč=343 is greater than S1=‚ąí343S_1 = -343S1‚Äč=‚ąí343.

Test case 222: It can be proved that no array of length 333 exists satisfying all conditions.
Test case 333: All elements are in the given range for the array A=[0,‚ąí5,343,‚ąí100]A = [0, -5, 343, -100]A=[0,‚ąí5,343,‚ąí100].

For i=1i = 1i=1: Since iii is odd, P1=0P_1 = 0P1‚Äč=0 is greater than S1=‚ąí100S_1 = -100S1‚Äč=‚ąí100.
For i=2i = 2i=2: Since iii is even, P2=0+(‚ąí5)=‚ąí5P_2 = 0 + (-5) = -5P2‚Äč=0+(‚ąí5)=‚ąí5 is less than S2=343+(‚ąí100)=243S_2 = 343 + (-100) = 243S2‚Äč=343+(‚ąí100)=243.
For i=3i = 3i=3: Since iii is odd, P3=0+(‚ąí5)+343=338P_3 = 0 + (-5) + 343 = 338P3‚Äč=0+(‚ąí5)+343=338 is greater than S3=(‚ąí5)+343+(‚ąí100)=238S_3 = (-5)+343 +(-100) = 238S3‚Äč=(‚ąí5)+343+(‚ąí100)=238.
